examples: The curving glass wall was made to order by Jeff Bell.
Eight monumental curving staircases of granite with over 4000 individually cast bronze balusters are capped by for skylight domes and two stained glass rotundas.
She smiled Dickon's own curving smile.
"I could see part of the train in front of me curving, " he said.
The city is centred on the Corniche, a wide, curving avenue that runs along the bay.
